name: @aily-project/board-metro_rp2040
description: The Adafruit Metro RP2040 is based on the RP2040 chip with dual-core Arm Cortex-M0+ processor at up to 133 MHz, 264 KB SRAM, 16 MB QSPI Flash, microSD slot, NeoPixel, STEMMA QT connector, and Metro Uno form factor.
description_en: The Adafruit Metro RP2040 is based on the RP2040 chip with dual-core Arm Cortex-M0+ processor at up to 133 MHz, 264 KB SRAM, 16 MB QSPI Flash, microSD slot, NeoPixel, STEMMA QT connector, and Metro Uno form factor.
description_zh_cn: Adafruit Metro RP2040 基于 RP2040 芯片，搭载双核 Arm Cortex-M0+ 处理器（最高 133 MHz）、264 KB SRAM、16 MB QSPI Flash，配备 microSD 卡槽、NeoPixel、STEMMA QT 连接器，采用 Metro Uno 外形。
author: Adafruit
